classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Canons of the Synods of Sardica, Carthage, Constantinople, and Carthage Under St. Cyprian, Which Canons Were Received by the Council in Trullo and Ratified by II. Nice.
The Canons of the CCXVII Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage. Commonly Called The Code of Canons of the African Church.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.

metadata.author: The Canons of the Synods of Sardica, Carthage, Constantinople, and Carthage Under St. Cyprian, Which Canons Were Received by the Council in Trullo and Ratified by II. Nice

title: Canon XXVI.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: That no one should take from the possessions of the Church.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Likewise it seemed good that no one should sell anything belonging to the Church: that if there was no revenue, and other great necessity urged thereto, this might be brought before the Metropolitan of the province that he might deliberate with the appointed number of bishops whether this should be done: that if such urgent necessity lay upon any church that it could not take counsel beforehand, at least let it call together the neighbouring bishops as witnesses, taking care to refer all the necessities of his church to the council: and that if he shall not do this, he shall be held as responsible toward God, and as a seller in the eye of the council, and he shall have lost thereby his honour.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Church goods must not be sold.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: If they bring in no revenue they may be sold at the will of the bishops.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: If the necessity does not allow that consultation should take place, he who sells shall call together the neighbouring bishops.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: If he does not do so he shall be held responsible to God and to the Synod.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: This is Canon v. of the Synod of Carthage, Sept.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
